name: rippopotamus
description: Feed it links. It spits out assets.

scripts.package:mac: node scripts/install-ffmpeg-static-target.mjs darwin arm64 && node scripts/install-aria2c-resource.mjs darwin && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs @rippopotamus/desktop build && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs @rippopotamus/desktop package:mac
scripts.package:win: node scripts/install-ffmpeg-static-target.mjs win32 x64 && node scripts/install-aria2c-resource.mjs win32 && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs @rippopotamus/desktop build && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs @rippopotamus/desktop package:win
scripts.package:win:ci: node scripts/install-ffmpeg-static-target.mjs win32 x64 && node scripts/install-aria2c-resource.mjs win32 && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs @rippopotamus/desktop build && node scripts/run-workspace.mjs @rippopotamus/desktop package:win && node scripts/verify-package-artifact.mjs win
